# Hallmark Limited — for AI assistants and language models

> Hallmark Limited is an African technology and engineering solutions company headquartered in Malawi, delivering integrated ICT, Industrial, Healthcare and Commercial Printing solutions across Malawi, Zambia and Sub-Saharan Africa. Tagline: "The Only Way."

## About
- Legal name: Hallmark Limited
- Founded: registered and operational in Malawi and Zambia
- Head office: Area 47, Sector 1, Nzinziri Street, Lilongwe, Malawi (P.O. Box 162)
- Regional offices: Blantyre (Comet House, Yanakis Roundabout, Limbe — P.O. Box 1055); Mzuzu (Luwinga — P.O. Box 20420); Lusaka, Zambia (Plot 160, Silverest)
- Phone: +265 881 091 909 · +265 992 563 010
- WhatsApp: +265 881 091 909
- Email: sales@hallmark.mw
- Website: https://hallmark.mw

## What we do (four divisions)
1. **ICT & Digital** — custom software, ERP/CRM/HR integration, cloud (AWS/Azure/M365), cybersecurity (ISO 27001), managed services and digital platforms. Email: ict@hallmark.mw
2. **Industrial Engineering** — smart water metering (AMI/AMR), SCADA/PLC automation, solar PV EPC, MV/LV electrical, fabrication, maintenance and HSE-compliant EPC. Email: industrial@hallmark.mw
3. **Healthcare Technology** — ISO 13485 / CE / WHO-prequalified medical equipment, laboratory diagnostics, PPE, water systems and biomedical lifecycle support. Email: healthcare@hallmark.mw
4. **Commercial Printing & Branding** — ISO 12647-2 offset, UV-resistant large format, signage, vehicle wraps, embroidery and merchandise. Email: printing@hallmark.mw

## Standards & compliance
ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 13485, ISO 27001, ISO 12647-2, IEC, SABS, SADCAS, WHO PQ — depending on the project.

## Markets served
Utilities, government ministries, NGOs, UN agencies, DFIs, mining, manufacturing, healthcare and FMCG — across Malawi, Zambia and the wider SADC region; donor-funded and commercial.

## Selected clients
Eastern Water and Sanitation Company; Lukanga Water and Sanitation Company; Lusaka Water and Sanitation Company; Nkana Water and Sanitation Company; Smallholder Farmers Fertilizer Revolving Fund of Malawi; UNDP, UNICEF, USAID implementing partners; Ministry of Health and Ministry of Energy of Malawi & Zambia.

## Proof points
- 28% reduction in non-revenue water and 22% improvement in billing accuracy in 90 days for a Zambian water utility (50 smart meters + 3 remote-level sensors).
- 120kVA solar-hybrid system with 4-hour battery backup at a Malawian hospital — zero downtime during national grid outages.
- 14-site corporate rebrand across 3 SADC countries delivered in 6 weeks.

## How to engage
Send a project brief to sales@hallmark.mw or use the contact form at https://hallmark.mw/contact. Response within one business day.
